definition: the quality of being beautiful or attractive
pleasing to the eye or ear; aesthetically pleasing
to accept something as true without evidence; to trust in the existence of something without proof
an acceptance that a statement is true or that someone is right
example: It's his belief that he can do it.

definition: to come into existence, to develop or grow
tending to become or turn into something; evolving or developing

pos: v. past tense and past participle of 'begin'
definition: to start an action or activity
example: He began a new job today.

definition: the point at which something starts, usually marked by the first act or event
example: The beginning of the school year is September.
